brand.name: Lexy
brand.tagline: The AI assistant for instant global compliance.

meta.title: Lexy — Instant global compliance, in any language.
meta.description: Lexy is the AI assistant that audits your documents against GDPR, the EU AI Act, LGPD and APPI — and delivers the report in any language.

hero.title: The AI assistant for instant global compliance.
hero.subtitle: Drop a policy, contract, or model card. Lexy cross-references it with GDPR, the EU AI Act, LGPD and APPI in seconds — and writes the report in your language.

multiPass.title: Multi-Pass engine
multiPass.body: Lexy audits in a canonical pivot language, then localizes the report into any BCP-47 language while keeping every legal citation verbatim.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge by design
zeroKnowledge.body: Documents live in memory only. Buffers are zeroed on every exit path. We persist the AI report, never your source file.

global.title: Global from day one
global.body: Six native languages, multi-currency Stripe checkout, automatic worldwide tax calculation, hreflang on every page.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay in your local currency. Taxes are calculated automatically.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For solo founders and small teams

audit.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, MD or TXT — up to 25 MB. Files are deleted after analysis.
audit.targetLanguageHint: Choose any language — Lexy will translate the final report.
audit.running: Lexy is auditing — this usually takes under a minute.
audit.zeroKnowledge: Zero-Knowledge: your document is wiped from disk and memory once the report is rendered.
